history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: R5 added single-arm DeLong CIs (arm_c contrast-only AUC 0.8391 [0.7527, 0.9255]) but paired DeLong is blocked by radiomics-filter mismatch (arm_b n=92 vs arm_c n=189). R5.2 honest within-nonPH protocol decoding on EXACT GCN-input graph aggregates: LR AUC 0.853 [0.722, 0.942] — significant protocol leakage on the actual GCN inputs. Disease AUC also strong (0.858 on contrast-only). Path forward: domain-adversarial debiasing + same-case-set rebuild of arm_b. Graph-stats coverage 243/282 = 39 cases missing must be audited.

next_round_plan: Round 6 priorities (per Round 5 reviewer): (a) rerun arm_b contrast-only on GPU 1 WITHOUT radiomics filter + per-case case_id dump → enables true paired DeLong; (b) audit the 39 missing-from-graph-stats cases vs 282 protocol table; (c) GCN-level exclusion sensitivity rebuild; (d) remote conda env lock + kimimaro pin; defer (e) TEASAR sweep + (f) embedding-level protocol to Round 7.
